content: It now includes a comprehensive guide to Every HM Chapter 100% clear deathless. Hyperlinks and much more go the main thread here https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1357184174485671966 or here https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1357183866183618741 . Link directly to the new Section is here https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1cC7FOebdy_J2hONmVT1QUSk6SxIRTuVoI4XADVlq5JU/edit?gid=441466965#gid=441466965 Here are some Screenshots It has detail guides on every difficult chapter and Even Arc 2, the full google sheet is to be considered in the V2.2 Game Guide competiton so please upvote the original thread and take a look <@1131790839291596841> <@244028747999608832>
